##LOCALITY=Gunheath pit, St. Austell, Cornwall, England
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Group of yellowish-brown indistinct small crystals associated with leucophosphite, R060338, and green chalcosiderite, R060339
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
